allow: Bash(node -e "const z = require\('@zxing/browser'\); const r = new z.BrowserMultiFormatReader\(\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(r\)\).filter\(m => m !== 'constructor'\).join\(', '\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const z = require\('@zxing/browser'\); const r = new z.BrowserMultiFormatReader\(\); const proto = Object.getPrototypeOf\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(r\)\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(proto\).filter\(m => m !== 'constructor'\).join\(', '\)\)")
